situational_context: Running comeback week 8-9: 12 structured runs since May 3 (54 days in). Run #12 on June 21 was a significant overreach at 7.5 km (target 4 km, suffer score 36). Run #13 cancelled June 24 due to extreme heatwave (41°C Paris). ACWR improved from 1.35 to 1.21, now within safe [0.8-1.3] band as chronic load caught up. HRV 7d avg declined further to 34 ms — 5 of 7 last days UNBALANCED, driven by accumulated fatigue + extreme heat stress. VO2max running improved to 40.8. Weight 103.67 kg (up ~1 kg, likely heat-related water retention). Body battery consistently low (only 1/7 days >=50). Currently in exceptional heatwave (red alert Paris, 37-41°C), easing toward weekend. Benjamin at Hotel Mercure Chantilly June 26-29 — forested trails available for cooler training. E-bike commuting remains primary activity modality. No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Run #13 — 4 km Z2 strict (Forêt de Chantilly)

recommendations.text: HRV recovery is the priority — 7d avg at 34 ms (below 37 target), 5/7 days UNBALANCED. Combined training fatigue + heat stress. Maintain current load, do not increase running distance beyond 4 km for Run #13 Sunday. If Saturday bike causes HRV to drop below 30 on Sunday morning, downgrade Run #13 to a 30-min forest walk.
recommendations.measurable: HRV 7d avg >= 36 ms within 7 days; no more than 2 consecutive UNBALANCED days next week

recommendations.text: Enforce distance discipline after Run #12 overreach (7.5 km vs 4 km target). Run #13 capped at 4 km strict. If today's commute is gravel (suffer > 25), reduce Sunday to 3 km. Overreach pattern mirrors March 2025 comeback failure — erratic distance jumps preceded injury at week 10.
recommendations.measurable: Run #13 distance <= 4 km; no unplanned distance extensions for next 2 weeks

recommendations.text: Heat management: Paris heatwave (37-41°C) suppressing HRV and body battery. Chantilly forest (June 27-28) provides shade and cooler microclimate (~3-5°C less). Hydrate >= 750 mL + electrolytes for any session. Schedule Vitamin D retest for early July — due at 8-week mark.
recommendations.measurable: No training in ambient >35°C without shade; Vitamin D lab ordered by July 7

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 30 ms or fails to recover toward 36+ ms by July 2
markers_to_watch.reason: Persistent UNBALANCED status (5/7 days) — combined training fatigue + heat stress. Should recover as heatwave breaks.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if body battery max fails to reach >= 50 on at least 3/7 days next week
markers_to_watch.reason: Only 1/7 days hit >= 50 this week — chronically low. Heat likely the driver; monitor as temperatures drop.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #13 triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Post-overreach (Run #12, 7.5 km) tissue monitoring critical at 103.7 kg body weight
